# "Overcoming Temptation"
## Scripture
"For we do not have a high priest who is unable to sympathize with our weaknesses, but one who in every respect has been tempted as we are, yet without sin." – Hebrews 4:15

## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we face many temptations in our daily lives. These could be anything from pride, anger, or covetousness, to lust, greed, or fear. But we have a high priest who understands our struggles, who has walked the same path we are on, and has overcome every temptation without sin. This should give us great hope and comfort as we navigate the challenges of life. Let us not be discouraged by our weaknesses, but rather draw near to the Lord and ask for His strength to overcome them. Remember, He is not a distant God who doesn't care, but a loving Father who is always with us, guiding and empowering us to live a life that honors Him.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 25 squats while praying for strength to resist temptation in your daily life."
